About Me

Building futures,
one project at a time.

I'm K.VN. Vijay, a Civil Engineering undergraduate from Seshadri Rao Gudlavalleru Engineering College, Andhra Pradesh. Rooted in Challapalli, Krishna District, I carry a deep passion for the built environment — from the structural to the aesthetic.

My goal is to become a Planning Engineer — orchestrating complex projects through scheduling mastery, cost precision, and strategic foresight. Alongside, I pursue Interior Design as a personal creative avenue, bridging technical rigor with spatial artistry.

I believe great construction is not just about materials and methods — it's about vision, coordination, and the courage to build something that lasts.

Say Hello →

Focus Areas

What drives
my work.

01
Planning & Scheduling

Transforming project visions into executable timelines. From WBS to Gantt charts, I orchestrate every milestone with Primavera P6 and MS Project to ensure on-time, on-budget delivery.

02
QS & Estimation

Precision is everything in quantity surveying. I apply rigorous cost estimation methodologies and advanced Excel modelling to quantify materials, labour, and project costs with accuracy.

03
Interior Designing

Where engineering meets art. Using SketchUp and REVIT, I conceptualise spatial experiences that balance function and form — designing interiors that breathe, inspire, and last.

Featured Project

My work in the wild.

Live Platform

ConstructionEdge

My personal knowledge platform dedicated to the construction and engineering world. A curated space where I share project insights, technical notes, design explorations, and industry learnings — built for students, professionals, and anyone who builds.
